output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?person ?birthDate WHERE {
  wd:Q21923229 wdt:P154 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P4253 3 .
  ?episode wdt:P154 ?season .
  ?episode wdt:P4805 ?airDate .
  FILTER(MONTH(?airDate) = 1)
  .
  ?person wdt:P155 ?episode .
  ?person wdt:P576 ?elimDate .
  FILTER(?elimDate = ?airDate)
  .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?airDate)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The birth date of the last celebrity eliminated in January on season three of Rachael vs. Guy: Celebrity Cook-Off is 1962-07-27.
output.formatted:
The birth date of the last celebrity eliminated in January on season three of Rachael vs. Guy: Celebrity Cook-Off is 1962-07-27.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?person ?birthDate WHERE {
  wd:Q21923229 wdt:P154 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P4253 3 .
  ?episode wdt:P154 ?season .
  ?episode wdt:P4805 ?airDate .
  FILTER(MONTH(?airDate) = 1)
  .
  ?person wdt:P155 ?episode .
  ?person wdt:P576 ?elimDate .
  FILTER(?elimDate = ?airDate)
  .
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?airDate)
LIMIT 1
```

args.sparql:
SELECT ?person ?birthDate WHERE {
  wd:Q21923229 wdt:P154 ?season.
  ?season wdt:P4253 3.
  ?episode wdt:P154 ?season.
  ?episode wdt:P4805 ?airDate.
  FILTER (MONTH(?airDate) = 1).
  ?person wdt:P155 ?episode.
  ?person wdt:P576 ?elimDate.
  FILTER (?elimDate = ?airDate).
  ?person wdt:P569 ?birthDate.
} ORDER BY DESC(?airDate) LIMIT 1
